pages.raw_text:
1 Mayor Moore this morning sign
Cd the ordinance vacating the alley
Between Main and Front avs. from
Colfax to Market SITS, where the
Northern Pacific railroad wants to
build spur track for the accom-
mediation of the Marshall-Wells
Warehouse Co.


The mayor also signed the ordi-
nance vacating an alley between
Sheridan and Hatch SITS. on East
Spragne av., where there are some
short lots caused by too close plat
ting Of additions. The alley was
worthless to the city.


The McGoldrick Lumber Co., by
the signing of another alley vaca.
ton by the mayor, was made the
present of some valuable property.
The vacation was along several lots
in Bradley & Dennis addition to the
east side Of Hatch st. Vacated
property reverts back to AUDITING
property and the lumber concern
owns all Of that
